violations.issue: No cleanup in test.afterAll() - API tests create data but never clean up
violations.recommendation: Add test.afterAll() to delete any equipos created during tests to prevent state pollution

violations.issue: No explicit cleanup - tests may leave selected equipment in UI state
violations.recommendation: Add test.afterEach() to clear form state and selection between tests

violations.issue: createdData tracking exists but is not populated - cleanup loop will not execute
violations.recommendation: Populate createdData.equipos array when seeding test data, or remove the tracking

strengths: P0 E2E tests have explicit cleanup structure (test.afterAll with loop)
Tests use storageState for auth - no login state pollution
No shared state variables between tests
Each test is self-contained with its own setup
Global auth state prevents login repetition across tests
summary: Good isolation with clear cleanup structure, but API and P1 tests need explicit cleanup implementation
